---
title: "My report"
author: "Samuel AG"
format: typst
---

# My report on the dataset by Nigro et al.

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
#| message: FALSE
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}
#| message: FALSE
dt <- read_csv(here("data/data_clean.csv"))
```

The general average fruit count is `r mean(dt$count, na.rm = TRUE)`.

```{r}
#| fig-cap: "Seed count vs. DBH"
#| warning: FALSE
ggplot(dt, aes(stem_cm, count, color = seed_maturation_timing)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_y_log10()
```
